name: Peanut Butter Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugars, peanut butter, shortening, softened butter, and egg in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well combined. Cover and refrigerate for about 2 hours or until firm.
3. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Shape dough into 1-1/4 inch balls.
5. Place cookies 3 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Flatten each cookie with a floured fork in a crisscross pattern.
7. Bake for 9-10 minutes or until light brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes before removing from the baking sheet.
